creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
When attempting to update drm-fbsd13-kmod to 5.4.144.g20211230, registration of the package fails with 31 files not found.

I have the SOURCE build option selected. If I disable that option (the default), the install is fine. As I really don't need the sources, I will leave it disabled, but I wanted to report the problem.
